ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name chosen by the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Player's email for communication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference for multilingual support */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active, inactive, banned) */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total play time of the player across all characters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was created */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "xp_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "last_level_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the last level up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the class icon for UI display */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Base attributes of the class (e.g., strength, agility, intelligence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_time" (
  "online_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each online time record */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "total_online_time" INTEGER /* Total online time in seconds */,
  "last_session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of the end of the last session */,
  "average_session_time" INTEGER /* Average session length in seconds */,
  "number_of_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("online_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_online_time_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's progress */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "current_quest" TEXT /* Current quest the player is on */,
  "completed_quests" INTEGER /* Number of quests completed */,
  "achievements_unlocked" INTEGER /* Number of achievements unlocked */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total play time of the player */,
  "xp_points" INTEGER /* Total experience points of the player */,
  "highest_level" INTEGER /* Highest level achieved by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "session_length" INTEGER /* Length of the session in seconds */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., quest, exploration, PvP) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., item, title, currency) */,
  "reward_value" TEXT /* Value of the reward (e.g., number of gold coins, item ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest */,
  "recommended_level" INTEGER /* Recommended character level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the quest */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the quest (e.g., level, previous quests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for unlocking the achievement */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the achievement icon */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for unlocking the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "unlock_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was unlocked */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress towards the achievement if it is a multi-step achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_quests" (
  "player_quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's quest completion */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the quest was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quest (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress in the quest if it is a multi-step quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_quests_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_quests_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game update */,
  "update_name" TEXT /* Name of the update */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed change log of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
